papergraph.title: HER catalyst with Tafel slope
papergraph.abstract: A NiFe LDH bifunctional electrocatalyst was synthesized for hydrogen evolution reaction in alkaline media. The benchmark includes overpotential and Tafel slope.
papergraph.full_text_excerpt: A NiFe LDH bifunctional electrocatalyst was synthesized for hydrogen evolution reaction in alkaline media. The benchmark includes overpotential and Tafel slope.
papergraph.conclusion: A NiFe LDH bifunctional electrocatalyst was synthesized for hydrogen evolution reaction in alkaline media. The benchmark includes overpotential and Tafel slope.
papergraph.benchmark: The benchmark includes overpotential and Tafel slope.
papergraph.contribution: A NiFe LDH bifunctional electrocatalyst was synthesized for hydrogen evolution reaction in alkaline media.
